titleStmt.title: SII 15.233: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 233. (A.R. No. 437 of 1926.) MANGUṆḌI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the ruined temple of Siddhaliṅgēśvara.

The record contains six dates. The first is the 16th year of the reign of Vīra-Jayakēśidēva, commencing from the Kaliyuga year 4289, Dundubhi, Pushya ba. 8, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The Kaliyuga year cited is the year from which the regnal year was reckoned. For the cyclic year Dundubhi falling within the reign of the Kadamba king, the details correspond to 1203 A.D., January 7. The weekday, however, was Tuesday.

The second date which is the cyclic year Rudhirōdgāri, Śrāvaṇa-pūrṇami, Friday, corresponds to 1203 A.D., July 25. The third date is the 25th year of the reign of Vīra-Jayakēśidēva, commencing from Kaliyuga year 4288, Prajāpati, Śrāvaṇa ba. 13, Monday. This corresponds to 1211 A.D., August 8, the year being current. The fourth date is the 28th year of the reign of Vīra-Jayakēśidēva, coMmencing from the Kaliyuga year 4289, Bhāva, Māgha ba. 1, Saturday, which corresponds to 1215 A.D., January 17, Saturday, f.d.t. °21. The fifth date is the 2nd regnal year of Vīra-Vajradēva, Dhātu, Śrāvaṇa śu. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1216 A.D., July 2. The last date is the 2nd regnal year of Vīra-Vajradēva. Dhātu, Mārgasīrsha śu [1] the weekday being lost. The details cannot be verified but it falls in the month of November in 1216 A.D.

The inscription commences with the formal Chālukya praśasti and refers to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla or Sōmēśvara IV who was actually no more. After giving a brief account of the Kadamba rulers of Goa, it introduces Jayakēśin III and his son Vajradēva who were ruling over Palasige Nāḍu. Next is described a line of ascetics who flourished at Maṇigundage in Hulambi Seventy. The last of them was Chandrabhūshaṇa. At the instance of this teacher a temple of Śiva was constructed with the co-operation of the residents of the place and named Tribuvanavīra-Jayakēśi, also called Siddhēśvara. Various gifts consisting of land, fixed shares of income, oil, etc., were made to this deity by Chauḍa-gāvuṇḍa, the Five-Hundred-and-four representatives of the place and others and these were entrusted into the hands of the above named teacher who was the trustee of the temple. Among such donors are mentioned the Three Hundred of Muguda, Ugura Three Hundred of Huppavaḷḷi, Nuggiyahaḷḷi, Sattivūr and the others of Kandagallu. Nandigāve, Sonnaligeyapura, Vijayāpura, Ayyāvaḷe and Khēḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ nama śivāya . namastuṁgaśirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁ
bhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vriddhiprava¨rddhamāna mā
caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ(baraṁ) saluttamire . vri . palateṟadiṁ pala¨rppogaḷe raṁjisuti¨rppa sudā naśūradiṁ sulali
ta kī¨rttiyaṁ taḷeda dibya tapōdhanadiṁnivaṁ karaṁ malevaribhūparaṁ da¨rppamiradi¨rppuva vīrabhaṭāḷiyiṁ karaṁ pala
sugenāḍadēṁ sogayisi¨rddudō kaḷpamahījadaṁdadiṁ . ka . Ā viṣayamanāḷda¨rppalarī vasudheya duṣṭaripugaḷaṁ geldudidu kēvame bhūḷa
mipāḷakāva¨rttamageṟagi niṁda bhūmīsvararaṁ . Antānvayadoḷu . vṟi . dēvaṁkāva ḍevanyabhūparariyaṁ koṁdikkuvaṁ bhītaraṁ
kāvaṁ taṁnna padadvayakkeṟagalā śatrukṣitīśa¨rkkaḷiṁnēnaṁ pēḷimenuttiralke śivacittaṁ vīra pe¨rmmāḍi tāṁ bhūvaṁdyaṁ negaḷdaṁ parā¨rtthacaritaṁ dō¨rgga¨rvvadoṁ
du . ka . Ātana sahōdaraṁ tāṁ bhūtaḷadoḷu kī¨rttivetta(ṁ)namaḷacaritraṁ mātēnū vijayadēvaṁgātaṁgā[¨r]ssariya bhū
mipāḷa¨rddhareyoḷu . Ātaṁgādaṁ tanūjaṁ bhūnuta jayakēśidēvamahipaṁ taḷedaṁ mānanidi sakaḷadhātriyanēnuṁ todaḷilla taṁna dakṣiṇabhujadoḷ .
va . Antā nṛpaṁ taṁna dakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍadiṁ bhūmaṁḍaḷamanottiyāḷdaṁ tanageṟa gadaribhūpara kādu vikrāṁtadu¨rbbiniṁderagida virōdhibhūparaṁ nelake sōvara
māḍisi saptakōṭīśvaradēvalabdavaraprasādanuṁ koṁkaṇacakrava¨rttiyuṁ haracaraṇa prasūtanuṁ tyāgasiṁhāsanacakrava¨rttiyumeṁbivu modalāda
nēka pese¨rggaḷesadu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyageyutta(tti)[¨rddu] . mattaṁ . puru hūtaṁgeṁdu vajrāyudhavatuḷabaḷaṁ rāmaṁgeṁtu bāṇaṁ girijādhī
śaṁge tējaṁ piridenisida pāṁḍurājaṁge pā¨rtthaṁ kiraṇaṁ sū¨ryyaṁge puṭṭi¨rdda mavara teṟadi puṇyātmakaṁ puṭṭidaṁtā naranātha vajradēvaṁ jitaripu ja
yakēśi kṣitīśage vīraṁ . mattamātana kṣatriyapavitrana nāḍoḷu hulaṁbiyeppattaṟoḷage . gaṇanegaḷuṁbavappa banadiṁ harikā
ya nī¨rggaḷiṁde tiṁtiṇiyenisidda patraphaḷapu[®pa]cayaṁgaḷinoldu nōḍe kaṇtaṇi yuva ni¨rjjarōdakadi pūgoḷadiṁdesadi¨rppudeṁdu dhāriṇi mige baṁ
ṇisaluke maṇiguṁdage śōbhisuti¨rppudāvagaṁ . va . Alli samastadhuraṁdhararappa tāpa sāṁnvayameṁteṁdaḍaṁ .
. manasija ninna da¨rppamanaḍaṁgisu pōgiravēḍa ninna du¨rvvinayadi ninna leye nutta rājavimukhyana kāhaḷōghavā[¨rddhinivi]se mecci micca
ṁdhare baṁṇisa peṁpiniṁdi[¨rppanī] śivasakti kaṇgesadanāśritakaḷpamahījaneṁbinaṁ . v® . dharegō¨rvvaṁ śivaśaktidēvamunipaṁ rāddhāṁ
paṁ smarada¨rppārisamastaśāstranipuṇaṁ cāritravārāsibandharavakkuṁ śivaśāsanāṁbaraśaśāṁkaṁ kī¨rtthiyaṁ tāḷdidaṁ paramānaṁdade dāra
prāsāda vistārakaṁ . v® . Antā munīśvaratanūbhava . dorevettaṁ sūktivettaṁ sakaḷamahimevettaṁ diṭaṁ peṁpuvettaṁ sthiracittaṁ śudhav®ttaṁ
paramapadavivettaṁ guṇaṁbetta(ṁ)neṁdīdhare niccaṁ nicca baṁṇnippudu sakaḷaguṇaśrīgaḍa¨rppāda yōgīśvaranīśānākhyanenatuḷaguṇōddhāmanaṁ prēmadiṁ
daṁ . Avara mahimōṁnatikkege bhuvanadoḷā¨rssariyenal tapaduṁnatiyiṁ dhavaḷisida kī¨rttiyoḷījavaya munīśvaranaśēṣa dhā
trītaḷamaṁ . Antā munīṁdrapādōpāṁtadoḷatiśayade tāḷdi tapaduṁnatiyaṁ kaṁtuge bhayamaṁ māḍi samaṁteseda māhā munīṁdra
nēṁ pesa¨rggoḷuvaṁ . śrī girijāvaraṁ sakaḷadēvajanastutanakṣayaṁ manōrāgi(ga)dinīge maṁgaḷamanutsavamuṁ caritā¨rtthavṛttiyiṁ yōgijanastutaṁge sa
kaḷāśritakaḷpakujaṁge śaṁkara caṁdrabhūsanamunipravaraṁge dhariti nilvinaṁ . bhāvajavajanaṁda śōbhisi sāsvatamappa sukhasvarūpadiṁdā
va tapasvi pēḷ dharege raṁjipanī munimukhyanandadiṁ kāvanaśēṣajīvanicayaṁgaḷanuddhata mōharājanaṁ sōvanaśēṣadānanidhi mānapayōnidhi
caṁdrabhūṣaṇaṁ . Antā munīśvaraṁ sakaḷadha¨rmmaprāsādamūlastaṁbhadante śivaśāsana manuddharisuva bageyiṁ samasta bhaktareṁba sa¨rvva samōḷi karedu .
māḍideṁ sivagrihamaṁ nāḍoḷanūnaprasiddhiyaṁ paḍedudanuṁ kēḍillada sukhanidhiyaṁ bēḍuvenīśvaranoḷeṁdu mana nuḍiyaloḍaṁ .
neradu baṇaṁjiga¨rmmudade kaṭṭidoḍaṁtara paṭṭava¨rtthiyiṁdavara babāppuveṁdate karedittude cāgavā¨rggevendiradatikōpadiṁ muḷiyalā jīvanannaraśēṣadha¨rmma
bharadoḷ rakṣipa¨rnnegaḷda paṭṭaṇanālka�ḷippa seṭṭiyaruvirasagoṁḍa bhakta janāvaḷiyoḷu dēvadāsiseṭṭiya sutanaṁ kāva
dha¨rmmamanivaṁ budhatatige vastuvaṁ gaṁgaṁṇaṁ . [Ēmemma] śaktiyiṁdaṁ nimmaḍigaḷu besasi daṁdadiṁ śivagrahamaṁ nū¨rmmaḍi māḍuva
vaṁdaṁpe¨rmmege kāḷidāsanatimudadiṁdaṁ . smararipupadābjabhṛṁgaṁ sthirataratēja guṇā� dāna vidhānaṁ varapuṇyamū¨rttiyenipaṁ karame
savaṁka va nāganamaḷacaritraṁ . Aṁntavaru mukhyavāgi yanaṁntippa da¨rtti yiṁde tōṁṭiganikaraṁ kaṁtuge sariyādava¨rggaḷumaṁ tāṇamaṁ mā
ḍida¨rmmahōtsavadiṁdaṁ . v® . nuḍidaṁtū¨rjjita kā¨ryyamaṁ paḍedu māḷpa¨rmmānya vaṁ maṁnipaggaḍaṇaṁ taṁmoḷanūnamāgi varadha¨rṁmmādhārarāda¨rmmanaṁ bē
ḍe vaṁdibrātamaṁ samuddharisuvaduvaṁ koṭṭava¨rppaḍe mātēṁ sthiracittarī yugura mūnū¨rvva¨rmmahāmahimarō . Ugurēśvaradēvakramayugamaṁ pūjisuva
ra¨rttiyiṁdanavarataṁ sogayisuvareṁdu baṁṇnipenagaṇitaguṇayutaranuguramūnū¨rvaru maṁ . vri . Eleya bhūjaṁgaraṁgajanarūpina peṁpi
noḷaṁ samānadiṁdale sogayi¨rpparī dharege satuḷaṁ sucaritravṛttiyaṁdalasada māḷpa dāna guṇadiṁ mahimōṁnnatiyaṁ jagajjanaṁ palataṟadiṁde
baṇnisaludāttaguṇāṁnvitarī dharitriyoḷ . sthiradiṁde mūlavaḷiya paramana pādāṁ buja yugmamaṁ pūjisuva¨rtthadiṁdavalliya bojaṁga¨rbhbharadiṁ
naṁ manōjāṁtakanaṁ . padapiṁ māḍuva dānaśakti śivadha¨rmmādhārakatvaṁ jagakkoda vi¨rddā[¨rppu] puṇyaduṁnavatikeyiṁdoppi¨rppa gāṁbhī¨ryyasaṁpadava
[tyū¨rjjita]mappa tējavinituṁ taṁmiṁdavādappuveṁbudu lōka puṁṇyamū¨rtti gaḷiva[¨rssā]si¨rvvarēṁ dhanyarō . matimaṁta¨rmahimāsama¨rttharatiśuddhā
cāraratyaṁtasaṁstutasucittarudāttarapratimariṁtī dhātriyoḷu saṁpadaruṁnnatiyoḷukēva ḷame mahāmahimareṁbī pe¨rmmeyaṁ pettareṁba śuddhasucari
tra riva¨rssāsi¨rvvarēṁ dhanyarō . dhare baṁṇnippudu tējaduṁnatikeyiṁ gāṁ bhī¨ryyadoṁdōjeyiṁ piriduṁ śōbhisuti¨rppanaṁ sucaritaprakhyātanaṁti
¨rppaneṁburutējōdhikasūnuvaṁ parahitabyāpāranaṁ puṇyadiṁ dorevetti¨rddanatyudāra ṇaṁ cāvuṁḍa gāvuṁḍanaṁ . Aṁtā samastabhaktaruṁ caṁdrabhū
ṣaṇadēvara niyamadiṁ śrī tṛtribhuvanavīrajayakēśidēvara dēvālayamaṁ savistaraṁ māḍidaradeṁtane . svasti kaliyuga saṁvatsaraṁ 4289 saṁ
daṁdādiyāgi śrīvīrajayakēśidēvava¨rṣada 16 neya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa Aṣtami budhavāradaṁdu vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa nimittaṁ cau
ḍa gāvuṁḍaṁ holibana huṇisayiṁ paḍuvalu voṁdu mattaru keyyiṁ A maṇiguṁdageya tribhuvanavīrajayakēśidēvara Acā¨ryyaru caṁdrabhū
ṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭanu . mattaṁ rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsa rada śrānaṇa śuddha puṇṇami śukravāradaṁdā maṇikuṁdageya sthaḷadā mū
nū¨rvvaru caitrada pa¨rvvakke pavitrada pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāga hasaya ha� vaṁntanitumaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhā
rāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattamā maṇiguṁdageyaydunūṟanālvaruṁ caitraḍa pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāga pavitrada pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāgavananitumaṁ caṁdra
bhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ kāvaṇada vināyakaṁge hasaya haṇaṁ modalāgi yā vināyakaṁge Ēnuhuṭṭidaḍaṁ
koṭṭeveṁdu Ā caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru mattaṁ mugudada mūnū¨rvvaruṁ pavitrada pa¨rvvakke Aḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁ
drabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ huppavaḷḷiya vuguramūnū¨rvvaru pavitrada pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdra
bhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ nuggiyahaḷḷi ya vuguramūnū¨rvvaruṁ pavitrada pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadē
varige kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ sattivūra vuguramūnū¨rvvaruṁ pavitrada pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ ka¨rcchi dhārāpū
[¨rvvakaṁ māḍi ko]ṭṭaru . mattanituṁ sāgaraduguramūnū¨rvvaruṁ pavitrada pa¨rvva kke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇa dēvarige kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi ko
ṭṭaru . yiṁtī Aidu sthaḷadavaru pavitrada para(¨rvva) nōḍalu baṁndu dēvakā¨ryamaṁ kaṁḍu dēvara prasādamanuṁḍu sthaḷamukhyavāgi bāḷabaḷi ha[¨rvva]dali pavitra
da pa¨rvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ kōlikō kaṁdaṁgallu naṁndigāve sūnnaligeyapura
vijayapuradayyāvaḷa khēḍavintī sthaḷadavaru mukhyavāgi sāsi¨rvvaruṁ pavitrada pa¨rvvakke nōḍaluṁ baṁdu dēvara kā¨ryyamaṁ kaṁḍu saṁtōsaṁ baṭṭu dēvarige hēṟiṁ
ga vīsa kāvaṇakka hēṟiṁge vīsama vokkaliṁge va¨rṣaṁprati hāgavaṁ sāsi¨rvvaruṁ nālku paṭṭaṇa mukhyavāgi caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru [.]
mattavā maṇiguṁdageya sthaḷadalu Aivattokkalu gāṇake soṭige yaṁṇeyaṁ horagaṇiṁ baṁdu māṟuva hāgake soṭige yeṁṇeyaṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakamāgi caṁdra
bhūṣaṇadēvarige koṭṭaru . śaraṇāgatarakṣakaraṁ hariharapādābjabhriṁgaraṁ dhāraṇiyoḷu sarigillade ballāḷgaḷanatimudadiṁ poḷacilli mūnū¨rvvaru . caitrada pa¨rvva
ke hāga pavitrada pa¨rvvake hāgaviṁtinitumaṁ vokaliṁge hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattavā maṇiguṁdageya hi
ṭṭina taḷāṟaṁ ciṇnaya nāyakaṁ taṁnna taḷāṟageyoḷage biḷiya koḷana muṁdottina huṇaseya marana hora kaṁba keyyaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara
kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svasti kaliyuga saṁvatsaraṁ 4288 saṁdaṁdādiyāgi śrī kādaṁba śrī vīra jayakēśi dēvava¨rṣada 25 neya prajāpati saṁvatsa
raṁ śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 13 sōmavāradaṁdu narasiṁha paṭṭava¨rddhanaru kīḷvāgu nōṁpiya dakṣiṇeya dānadiṁ maiḷalamahādēviyavara keyyaṁ haḍada maṇiguṁdageya kuruḍa
na koḷana kaḷagaṇa modalēriya nālku bhaṁḍi bhattada gaddeyanu Avara makkaḷu mādhava ghaissaru Avara taṁmmaṁdiru va paddayyaṁgaḷu Avara taṁmmaṁdiru tikayyaṁgaḷu Avara taṁmmaṁ
diru viṣṇudēvanaṁtā nālvara kaiyyalu Ā gaddeyanu maṇiguṁdageya jōIsa bommayyaṁgaḷa makkaḷu Acayya tippayyaṁgaḷu krayavāgi koṁḍiralu Ā tippayya māḍida riṇakke [Ā]
tanataṁmaṁ Ātana heṁḍati tippavve tamma bhāva Acayyaṁge kuḍalu Ā Acayyanu tanna gaddeya nālku bhaṁḍi bhattada sthaḷada nālku sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe . mūḍaṇasīme hu
ppavaḷḷiya sīme baḍagaṇa sīme huppavaḷḷiya dāri teṁkaṇasīme Araḷiya gaddeya baḍagaṇa baruhu mēre paḍuvaṇa sīmege kurucana koḷana Ēri Aṁtā nālkuṁ sīmeya stha
ḷa hacugiloḷage Aḻugeyavara mane magila hoṟage Ikkeya mana Akṣiṇi Āgāmi sahita samasta badi sahita maṇiguṁdageya śrī grāmēśvaradēvarācā¨ryya caṁdrabhūṣa
ṇadēvara keyyalu lokkiya priyaśrāheya gadyāṇa 52 maṁ koṁḍu Ā grāmēśvaradēvarige krayadānavāgi koṭṭaru . svasti kaliyuga saṁvatsaraṁ 4289 saṁdaṁdādiyā
gi śrī kādaṁba śrī vīrajayakēśidēvava¨rṣada 28 neya bhāva saṁvatsarada māgha ba 1 vaḍḍa vāradaṁdu hūliya Iśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaruṁ Avara makkaḷu nārasiṁhabhaṭṭaru Aṁtivara kaiyyaluṁ
maṇiguṁdageyalu siddēśvaradēvara vupahāra dēvakā¨ryyanimittaṁ Ā sthānācā¨ryya caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvaru Ā maṇiguṁdageya praviṣṭada bommanahaḷḷiyalli śrīmadarasaralli Ā yīśvarabhaṭṭaru ha
ḍada bhūmiyoḷage mareya bōra māḍuva gaddeya Eraḍu hasugeya voṁbhattu bhaṁḍi bhattada sthaḷa Ā baḷiya hakkalu Adara nālku sīme Eṁtaṁdaḍe mūḍaṇa sīme bommana haḷḷiya keṟeya muṁ
dottina Ēri teṁkaṇasīme bommanahaḷḷiya baḍagada sīme haḷḷaṁga� yiṁ baṁda bhaṁḍidāri paḍuvaṇasīme kariyarāyaṇana hakkala baruhu . baḍagalu malla� haḷḷiya holana sīme mēre Aṁtā nālku
sīmevoḷage jala vrikṣa pāṣāṇa triṇa kadaṁba caturāghāṭa sahita Ā keyya baḷiya maneya nivēṣanadoḷage hitilalu mūḍaluṁ paḍuvaluṁ Ayigayiyagala . teṁkaluṁ baḍagaluṁ Ā maneya
nīḷa hoṟagāgi Ā voṁdu sthaḷada maneya nivēśana mattadaṟiṁ maṇeya kāvaṇa villa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi sahita samasta baḷi sahita yiṁtidakke Ā Iśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige Ā caṁdrabhūṣaṇa
ya gadyāṇa Aṟuvattu honnakoṭṭukrayadānavāgi koṁḍaru Ā bhūmiyanu māṟakoṁballi hattida honnu kuṟiya gētaṇanuṁ hulugula kallaṇanuṁ koṭṭu dha¨rmmavaṁ māḍidaru svasti
vīrabhujabaḷa vajradēvava¨rṣada 2 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 5 guruvāradaṁdu maṇiguṁdegeya vrittimaṁta brāhmaṇaru Ā sthaḷada siddhēśvaradācā¨ryya caṁdrabhūṣaṇa
dēvara Ā siddēśvara grāmēśvaradēvara sthaḷada keyimanegaḷu brāhmaṇa vrittivōpādiya dēhāraṇeyanāvuduvaṁ koḷḷeveṁdu koṭṭa Ā brāhmaṇavritti yō
pādiya hasugeyanāvuduvaṁ Ā caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvaraṟasaveṁdu Ā brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa kūci . Ā maṇiguṁdageyuguramūnū¨rvvaru śrī siddhēśvara dēvara
caitrakke bēḷeya biṭṭaru . Ā maṇiguṁdageya Ayinūṟanālvaru Ā siddhēśvaradēvarige Āḷige caitrakke hāgavoṁdu pavitrakke hāgavoṁdu biṭṭaru Āḷāgi rāsigeṟuvalli kāvaṇada
hasige haṇavoṁda biṭṭaru . sāsi¨rvvaru Ā siddhēśvaradēvarige Eleya hēṟiṁge vīsavoṁda biṭṭaru . suṁkadadhikāri dēvayya caṁdayyaṁgaḷu Ā grāmēśvara siddhēśvaradēvara sī
meya nivēśanagaḷoḷage Aṁgaḍi gāṇakke suṁka taḷasārige maṁnnaṇeyaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . svasti śrī kādaṁba śrī vīrabhujabaḷa vajradēvava¨rṣada 2 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada mā¨rggaśī¨rṣa śuddha
1 huliyamaseṭṭi taṁna maga bhairavana baṁḍiya hūḍidalli Ā bhairava mritanāgalu śrī siddhēśvaradēvara muṁde Ā bhairavana hesaralu bhairavadēvara pratiṣṭha
bhairavadēvara nityā na Upahārakke siddhēśvaradēvarācā¨ryya caṁdrabhūśaṇadēvaru hūliya yīśvarabhaṭṭara kaiyiṁ
geyyavoḷage keḷagaṇa hasugeyoḷage modalēriya keḷage Ā caṁdra bhūṣaṇadēvara kaiyyalu
ya mattaṟoṁdu . sthaḷakke lokkiya gadyāṇa hattuma koṭṭa kraya vāgi koṁgu Olōgama dēva Āga koṭṭanu .
Digital edition of SII 15.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
